claim.observation: Trusted TerminalServices/RDP window summary records the selected CYLR extract has 4 EVTX files and zero TerminalServices/RDP-named EVTX files; the parsed EVTX CSV has 60371 rows. The scan found 5 TerminalServices/RDP-like rows globally in System.evtx, with time range 2016-06-18T20:40:57Z..2018-01-16T18:32:16Z, and zero TerminalServices/RDP-like rows in the 2018-05-13T10:05Z..10:15Z target window.
claim.interpretation: This is a bounded availability/timing boundary for the parsed EVTX set and named EVTX availability. It does not prove no remote access occurred elsewhere, and it does not establish human identity, file transfer, or cloud upload completion.
